title: Cuckoo Clock Chaos
short_description: Set the cuckoo clock EXACTLY right — get it wrong and the cuckoo bursts out screaming and wakes the angry gnomes.
description: The cuckoo bird refuses to come out unless the clock is set EXACTLY right. Nudge the hour and minute hands on a real analog clock face to match each written time — get it wrong and the cuckoo bursts out screaming at 3 a.m., waking an entire village of tiny furious gnomes. Grade bands ramp from o'clock and half past, to quarter past and 5-minute times, to any time plus elapsed-time challenges ("set the clock 45 minutes later"). A free online telling-time game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the + and − buttons to move the hour and minute hands, then press Release the cuckoo.
